final_prompt: An eye-level photograph capturing a snowy winter park scene. Centered in the foreground, a young East Asian man in his late 20s smiles; he has light skin, short curly dark hair, and wears a light blue short-sleeved button-up shirt, khaki pants, and white sneakers. To his immediate right, a Golden Retriever dog sits with a friendly expression, its light golden fur contrasting against the white snow. The ground is blanketed in textured white snow with footprints and scattered leaves. In the middle ground, numerous people are scattered, dressed in winter coats, scarves, and hats—some walking in pairs, others standing in groups—creating a bustling atmosphere. Deciduous trees with bare or snow-dusted branches stand on the left and in the background, their dark trunks and branches prominent against the snow. Wooden benches with metal frames are partially covered in snow on the left and right in the background. A paved path winds through the park behind the man and dog. In the far background, a calm water body reflects the overcast gray sky, with a faint distant city skyline visible. The lighting is soft and diffused from an overcast sky, casting gentle shadows on the snow, resulting in a cold, wintery atmosphere with a palette dominated by white, gray, and muted colors. The image is photorealistic, with sharp focus and natural colors.
prompt_before: An eye-level photograph of a park scene on a snowy winter day. In the center foreground, a young East Asian man in his late 20s stands smiling; he has light skin, short curly dark hair, and wears a light blue short-sleeved button-up shirt, khaki pants, and white sneakers. To his right, a Golden Retriever dog sits with a friendly expression, its light golden fur contrasting against the snow. The ground is covered with a layer of white snow, showing subtle textures, footprints, and scattered leaves. In the middle ground, numerous people are scattered throughout the park, dressed in winter coats, scarves, and hats, some walking in pairs, others standing in groups, adding a bustling atmosphere. Deciduous trees with bare or snow-dusted branches rise on the left and background, their dark trunks and branches standing out against the white snow. Wooden benches with metal frames are visible on the left and right, partially covered with snow. A paved path winds through the park behind the man and dog. In the background, a calm water body reflects the overcast gray sky, with a distant city skyline faintly visible. The lighting is soft and diffused from an overcast sky, casting gentle shadows on the snow and creating a cold, wintery atmosphere with a dominant palette of white, gray, and muted colors. Photorealistic, sharp focus, natural colors. Perspective: Camera viewpoint: eye-level, facing the man and dog, with the man centered in the foreground; Spatial positions: man in CENTER foreground, dog to RIGHT of man in foreground, trees on LEFT and BACKGROUND, benches on LEFT and RIGHT in BACKGROUND, paved path in BACKGROUND, water body in far BACKGROUND, sky at TOP. Style reference: People details: original man – East Asian, young in his late 20s, light skin, short curly dark hair, smiling, wearing light blue short-sleeved button-up shirt, khaki pants, white sneakers; added people – various ages, dressed in winter coats, scarves, hats, scattered throughout; Surface materials: original grass (soft, green), path (paved), benches (wooden/metal); changed to snow (white, textured, with footprints), winter clothing fabrics (coats, scarves); People details: original man – East Asian, young in his late 20s, light skin, short curly dark hair, smiling, wearing light blue short-sleeved button-up shirt, khaki pants, white sneakers; added people – various ages, dressed in winter coats, scarves, hats, scattered throughout; Overall atmosphere: original peaceful sunny day; changed to cold, wintery, bustling with people.

constraints: Is the camera viewpoint at eye-level?
Is the man centered in the foreground?
Is the dog positioned to the right of the man in the foreground?
Does the man have light skin?
Does the man have short curly dark hair?
Is the man smiling?
Is the man wearing a light blue short-sleeved button-up shirt?
Are the man's pants khaki?
Are the man's sneakers white?
Is the dog a Golden Retriever with light golden fur?
Does the dog have a friendly expression?
Is the ground covered with white snow?
Does the snow show textures, footprints, and scattered leaves?
Are there multiple people in the middle ground?
Are the people in the middle ground wearing winter coats, scarves, and hats?
Are there people walking in pairs and standing in groups?
Are there trees with bare or snow-dusted branches on the left and in the background?
Do the trees have dark trunks and branches?
Are there wooden benches with metal frames on the left and right in the background?
Are the benches partially covered with snow?
Is there a paved path in the background?
Is there a water body in the far background?
Does the water reflect the overcast gray sky?
Is a distant city skyline faintly visible?
Is the sky overcast and gray?
Is the lighting soft and diffused?
Does the lighting cast gentle shadows on the snow?
Is the overall color palette dominated by white, gray, and muted colors?
Is the image photorealistic?
Is the focus sharp?
Are the colors natural?
